kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your environmental law firm operations manager. I keep your regulatory deadlines tracked, your client pipeline moving, and your compliance matters organized. What do you need?

quickActions.label: Schedule a compliance consultation
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule an initial consultation for a business facing an EPA enforcement action this week.

quickActions.label: Create a retainer estimate
quickActions.prompt: Draft a retainer fee estimate for representing a client in a CERCLA Superfund matter.

quickActions.label: Check regulatory deadlines
quickActions.prompt: Show me all upcoming regulatory filing deadlines, comment periods, and court dates for the next 30 days.

quickActions.label: View today's schedule
quickActions.prompt: Show me today's client meetings, agency hearings, and internal case reviews.

quickActions.label: Follow up on open inquiries
quickActions.prompt: Show me all prospective client inquiries from the past week that still need consultation scheduling.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for an environmental law firm. You understand Clean Water Act enforcement, Clean Air Act compliance, CERCLA/Superfund liability, RCRA hazardous waste regulations, NEPA environmental impact review, endangered species litigation, brownfield redevelopment, environmental permitting, and toxic tort claims. You help manage client intake, track complex regulatory deadlines and public comment periods, schedule consultations and hearings, generate retainer agreements, and manage client communications. Always reference relevant federal and state environmental statutes and agency regulations when appropriate.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, experienced environmental law attorneys. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Respond to an EPA or state enforcement notice
Inquire about Superfund or CERCLA liability
Inquire about contamination and toxic tort claims
Ask about NEPA review or environmental impact statements

steps.title: Firm details
steps.description: Enter your environmental law firm name, address, jurisdictions served, and contact information.

steps.title: Practice areas
steps.description: Select your environmental practice areas: Clean Water Act, Clean Air Act, CERCLA, RCRA, NEPA, endangered species, permitting, and toxic torts.

steps.title: Your attorneys
steps.description: Add your environmental attorneys and paralegals with their bar admissions, regulatory specialties, and availability.

steps.title: Fee structure
steps.description: Set your consultation fees, retainer amounts, hourly rates, and flat-fee options for common environmental matters.

steps.title: Connect your tools
steps.description: Link your Google Business Profile, payment processor, case management system, and regulatory tracking tools.

steps.title: Go live
steps.description: Review your setup, activate your AI receptionist, and start capturing environmental law client leads.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for an environmental law firm.
capabilities: Schedule client consultations, agency hearings, and court appearances
Generate retainer agreements and fee estimates for environmental matters
Track regulatory filing deadlines, public comment periods, and compliance dates
Manage client intake from initial inquiry through case engagement
Coordinate with environmental consultants, engineers, and expert witnesses
Monitor EPA and state agency dockets for case-relevant actions
Send automated case status updates and deadline reminders to clients
Track case milestones across enforcement, compliance, and litigation matters
Send review requests to clients after successful case resolution
Analyze firm revenue and caseload by environmental practice area
